title: blotiella bouxiniana
intro: Blotiella bouxiniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as a type of fern. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Blotiella bouxiniana include the potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Blotiella bouxiniana typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
